Staged at Lumpinee Stadium in Bangkok on 10 April, OFF150 features nine bouts across Muay Thai, MMA and kickboxing. 
In the main event, strawweight Muay Thai sees Kompet Sitsarawatsuer face Attachai Kelasport, while the co-main event pits Rambong Sor Therapat against Pethuahin Jitmuangnon in flyweight Muay Thai.

The final stage of the Tour of Oman delivered a climbers’ showdown on the slopes of Green Mountain, where the week’s main favorite, Adam Yates, ultimately failed to turn the situation to his advantage, leaving the victory of the Stage and of the Tour of Oman to Christian Scaroni.

beIN SPORTS 5.desc_ar: Rennes have scored in each of their 27 home games against Angers in Ligue 1, the highest tally of home games against the same opponent for a team while scoring every time in the division. Rennes have won five of their last seven Ligue 1 matches, with only Monaco  and Lille  picking up more points than SRFC  over the period. Rennes are three points off the podium heading into this MD29, having been 11 points behind third place after MD21 and at the time of Habib Beye's dismissal.

Latest news from the beIn SPORTS News room, previewing and reviewing developments and scores with contribution from around the world from beIN's reporters.

Al Jawla covers the latest news and stories from sporting events across the planet. Including latest results and latest scores from the most recent games taking place. This daily look at the latest stories provides a fast paced update to sporting events.

In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.
A  daily Special Interview related to an important issue of the day. The interview offers the background and insight into the issue chosen from the world of sport.
"Special Report" is a single long feature from one of beIN SPORTS News reporters that takes an alternative look at a subject from the world of sport.
A special News Bulletin from the beIN SPORTS News Room with the addition of sign language for the hard of hearing.
"Al Hassila" provides a concise recap of the latest sports matches, highlighting key goals and noteworthy moments from around the world of sports.

This week SoAnne is in Nantes. The football challenge will see 6 children compete on a life-size tic-tac-toe board, coached by Johann Lepenant. Pablo Pagis will answer questions from Maeli and Alana for the locker room interview at FC Lorient, and Sidiki has a wonderful surprise in store for his number one fan.
The Issue Of The Day, from the beIn Sports News Team, takes an in depth look at the the main story form the world of sport from the last 24 hours.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.title_fr: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarts de Finale - Aller
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_ar: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_ar: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.title_ar: باريس سان جيرمان ضد ليفربول - دوري أبطال أوروبا 2025/26 - ربع النهائي - مباراة الذهاب
beIN SPORTS EN 1.title_en: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.title_fr: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarts de Finale - Aller
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_ar: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.title_en: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.title_fr: Barcelone vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarts de Finale - Aller
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_ar: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG  have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.

beIN SPORTS.desc_ar: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s  14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

beIN SPORTS.desc_ar: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s  14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

beIN SPORTS 7.title_ar: سانت اتيان ضد دونكيرك - الدوري الفرنسي 2 - 2025/2026
beIN SPORTS 7.desc_ar: Ligue 2 is the second division of French football. Ligue 2 is contested by 18 clubs, the league operates on a system of promotion and relegation with both Ligue 1 and the third division Championnat National. The teams play 34 games each, totaling 306 games in the season. The biggest games from each match Day are live and exclusive on beIN.

beIN SPORTS 7.desc_ar: Held from 5–12 April at the Monte-Carlo Country Club, the event marks the opening of the European clay season. Featuring a 56-player singles draw on outdoor clay, it brings together top-ranked players competing in best-of-three-set matches as they build form ahead of Roland Garros.
